name: bj-share
title: BJ-Share
description: This extension can provide quick access to BJ-Share torrents using RSS feed
author: alexandremt

commands.name: search-torrents
commands.title: Search Torrents
commands.description: Search the BJ-Share tracker RSS feed.

commands.name: manage-feeds
commands.title: Manage Feeds
commands.description: Add or remove RSS feed URLs.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
